batch_assignment_guidelines.complexity_medium: Moderate dependencies, some complexity, standard maintenance
batch_assignment_guidelines.complexity_high: Complex repos, many dependencies, legacy code
batch_assignment_guidelines.risk_low: Few or no vulnerabilities, healthy codebase
batch_assignment_guidelines.risk_high: Critical vulnerabilities, abandoned, or known exploits
